svg.title: Made2Match matrimony API flow
svg.desc: Complete user journey from authentication through profile onboarding, enrichment steps, to profile search and matching.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the register API work in Made2Match?')
sendPrompt('How does the login API work in Made2Match?')
sendPrompt('What fields are in profile step 1 basic details?')
sendPrompt('What fields are in profile step 2 personal details?')
sendPrompt('What fields are in profile step 3 professional details?')

svg.text: Additional profile steps (optional — skip for now available)
